summary: Tested and FIXED the 'Copia da anagrafica esistente' (Copy from existing client) feature in CreateClienteModal. Found and fixed a bug where the frontend was looking for 'response.data.items' but the backend returns 'response.data.clienti'. All feature requirements are now working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Line 22524 in App.js - Changed 'response.data.items' to 'response.data.clienti' to match backend response structure
The copy client feature code implementation is correct (lines 22506-22587 in App.js)
The UI rendering with data-testid attributes is properly implemented (lines 23973-24060)
The confirm dialog logic for overwrite is correctly implemented using window.confirm()
The field exclusion logic (codice_fiscale, partita_iva, telefono, email, IBAN, note) is correctly implemented
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing clients in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: The copy client feature is fully working. All tests passed after fixing the response data key from 'items' to 'clienti'.

bug_fix_applied.reason: Backend returns ClientiPaginatedResponse with 'clienti' key, not 'items'
